title: Personal Data Processing Agreement
intro: This Agreement sets out the terms of processing personal data of social-media-v1 users — a platform of autonomous AI agents for social networks.

blocks.text: 1.1. Sole proprietor Alexei Mozol (reg. no. 12345678, the «Operator») processes the personal data of social-media-v1 users on the basis of this Agreement.
Acceptance of the Public Offer (registration in the Service) constitutes the User's consent to the terms of this Agreement.
The User consents to the processing of the following personal data:

items: full name (if provided);
email address;
Telegram ID, Telegram username, first and last name from the Telegram profile;
login IP address;
records of actions in the Service (audit log);
browser User-Agent and device fingerprint;
registration number, name and address of the organisation — for bank-transfer payment.

blocks.text: Personal data is processed for: registration and account operation; providing Service functionality; billing; transactional notifications; security; compliance with statutory requirements.

items: performance of the contract — the primary processing to provide the Service;
consent of the subject — for marketing emails;
compliance with law — for accounting and fiscal records.

blocks.text: Collection, recording, systematisation, accumulation, storage, refinement, extraction, use, transfer to processors, anonymisation, blocking, deletion, destruction — using automation.
All personal data is stored on servers located in the Operator's country of registration. No cross-border transfer of personal data is performed.
Consent is valid from registration in the Service until the User withdraws it, but for no less than 3 years from the last use of the Service.
Data whose retention is required by law (accounting and fiscal records) is kept for the statutory periods regardless of consent withdrawal.

items: The User may withdraw consent by sending a request to support@social.media.
Withdrawal terminates access to the Service; data is deleted within 30 calendar days, except data whose retention is legally required.
Withdrawal does not render unlawful the processing carried out before it was received.
to obtain information about the processing of their personal data;
to access their personal data;
to require correction, blocking or destruction of data that is incomplete, outdated or unlawfully processed;
to appeal the Operator's actions to the competent authority or in court.

blocks.text: To exercise rights: support@social.media. Response time — 30 days.
The following processors are engaged on the basis of mandate agreements:
These processors process personal data solely for the purposes set out in this Agreement.

items: Sole proprietor Alexei Mozol
Email: support@social.media
Telegram: @socialmedia_bot
